title: Cataloging the Arcane
description: As a new Novice of the Arcane Circle, you've been assigned library duty at the Athenaeum. Help organize the magical texts and learn about the different schools of magic. While cataloging, you discover a dangerous tome misfiled in the common section - it must be moved to the restricted vault immediately.

objectives.description: Organize magical texts in the Athenaeum library
objectives.notes: Interact with 5 different bookshelves to organize them

objectives.description: Place the forbidden tome in the restricted vault
Report your findings to Archmage Elara

notes: Second quest. Teaches about magical schools and introduces forbidden magic concept. Rewards fire spell.
